description: An operational auditor reviews the performance of the company's primary 3PL provider.

nodes.task_description: Review the SLA in the 3PL contract, focusing on the metrics for on-time delivery and order accuracy.

expected_outcome.value: Auditor understands the performance standards the vendor is supposed to meet.

nodes.task_description: Analyze the 3PL's performance reports for the last 12 months.

expected_outcome.value: Auditor finds that on-time delivery has been below the SLA target of 98% for the last 4 months.

nodes.task_description: Calculate any penalties or service credits due to the company as a result of the SLA breach.

expected_outcome.value: Auditor determines the company is owed service credits and recommends they be claimed.
